context.projectOverview: agent-bober: multi-agent autonomous build harness (TypeScript ESM, NodeNext). This spec adds the proactive medical intelligence layer to the existing src/medical/ module. Sprint 1: a deterministic, offline proactive review pass over the existing HealthDataStore lab series that detects reference-range crossings and slope trends and writes Finding notes (markdown-with-frontmatter) plus a Dataview dashboard into a medical vault, exposed via `bober medical review` and a runnable runProactiveReview entrypoint the scheduler can import.

notes: All contract details (success criteria, nonGoals, stopConditions, assumptions, estimatedFiles) are in .bober/contracts/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-1.json. The full spec context (features, NFRs, dataModel, security) is in .bober/specs/spec-20260628-medical-analysis.json. Read the Sprint Briefing at .bober/briefings/sprint-spec-20260628-medical-analysis-1-briefing.md FIRST.
